scripts.build: npm run build --workspace ninox-node-typescript-template && npm run build --workspace @ninox/stock-dashboard-app
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace ninox-node-typescript-template && npm run dev --workspace @ninox/stock-dashboard-app
scripts.start: npm run build --workspace ninox-node-typescript-template && npm run start --workspace @ninox/stock-dashboard-app
